query:
SELECT DISTINCT role_id FROM permissions p
         WHERE tier_id = $1 AND action = 'StartHeadcount'
           AND NOT EXISTS (
               SELECT 1 FROM permissions q
               WHERE q.role_id = p.role_id
                 AND q.tier_id = p.tier_id
                 AND q.action = 'ConvertHeadcount'
           )
         ORDER BY role_id
